text: i just mass liked my ex's photos from 2019 and now i have to fake my own death
my therapist said i need to set boundaries so i blocked her
fell asleep during my own birthday party and honestly peak self care
my sourdough starter has more consistent growth than my career
the npc that gives you a side quest but the side quest is trauma dumping
built a whole bookshelf upside down and didnt notice for 3 weeks
my actual password is stronger than my will to live
cant even be emotionally unavailable in peace anymore mercury is in gatorade
the uber driver asked how my day was and i started crying so
its 4am and im googling if raccoons can love
normalize leaving parties early because your cat might be lonely
i told my plant im proud of it and now im crying in the kitchen
airpods will evolve into brain implants by 2031 and we'll just let it happen
hot take: cereal is soup and you cant change my mind
millennials will gatekeep avocado toast from gen alpha mark my words
i sexted someone and they corrected my grammar
cottage cheese is just milk that gave up on itself
gen z discovered whistling and acts like they invented sound
the s in iot stands for security lmao
just whispered 'alexa stop' at a real human being
i meal prepped 5 days of sadness into little containers
my love language is sending memes at 2am with no context
normalize saying 'i dont want to' instead of making up a whole illness
ketchup on eggs is a personality test and you failed
i use incognito mode to google things i should already know at my age
my screen time report just called me a disappointment
having a body is so inconvenient i just want to be a cloud
we're all just npcs in someone else's main quest tbh
accidentally called my boss mom and now i work from home forever
in 2030 youll need a subscription to open your own fridge
told my date i was a morning person and god struck me down immediately
my toxic trait is thinking i can fix the wifi by staring at it
manifesting a nap so powerful i wake up in a different tax bracket
ur sourdough discard pancakes arent a personality karen
i have the confidence of a man who has never read the room
my linkedin is just a graveyard of jobs i cried at
they should make a dating app where u match based on sleep schedules
horny but make it existential
microwave ramen at 3am hits different when you're having a crisis
gen z thinks typing in lowercase is a whole aesthetic. millennials just gave up on shift
i pet a strangers dog without asking and it was worth the restraining order
every smart device in my house is spying on me and none of them text back
my attachment style is 'read receipt off'
the password requirements are harder than my actual degree
ikea furniture is just adult lego with worse instructions and more divorce
mercury retrograde ended but im still making terrible decisions
the uber pool conversation was deeper than my last relationship
i just want someone to look at me the way i look at cheese
my plant died and my therapist asked how that made me feel about my father
the algorithm knows im sad before i do
ranch dressing on pizza is a civil rights issue and i will die on this hill
millennials invented burnout and gen z perfected it honestly respect
we need a safeword for zoom meetings
my wifi name is 'FBI Surveillance Van' and my neighbor moved out
just realized i say 'no worries' when there are in fact many worries
alexa played me a breakup playlist and i wasnt even in a relationship
i wish i had the emotional range of the check engine light
showering is just standing in the rain voluntarily and pretending its fine
every group chat is just one person typing and everyone else liking
adulting is just saying 'we have food at home' to yourself forever
my financial plan is hoping that one aunt remembers me in her will
the gym is just paying rent to suffer in a building
i flirt like a malfunctioning roomba. just bumping into walls
napping is just free time travel if you think about it
my sourdough starter outlived two of my relationships
the main quest is just surviving until friday at this point
built a desk from ikea in 6 hours. marriage lasted 4
my 2fa is more protective than anyone ive ever dated
mercury in retrograde is just astrology's 'have you tried restarting it'
the uber driver had a phd and it ruined my whole week
cant sleep because i remembered something i said in 2014
mayo on fries is the hill i will die on. alone. covered in mayo
gen z doesnt know what a dial tone sounds like and it shows
i only leave my house for the cat and the cat doesnt even like me
sent a risky text and immediately threw my phone across the room
in 5 years well need to solve a captcha to use a public toilet
my love language is parallel play with wifi
oat milk ruined a whole generation and i was the first casualty
the fridge light is the only thing that checks on me consistently
normalize bringing your own fork to restaurants in case the vibes are off
my screen time went down 2 minutes and my phone congratulated me like i cured something
chatgpt will be best man at weddings by 2028 calling it now
i told the truth once and got unfollowed by 3 people
my roomba knows more about my floor plan than i do
existence is just a group project nobody signed up for
i have 47 containers and exactly zero matching lids this is my villain origin
replied 'lol' to a paragraph and felt nothing
googled 'is 30 old' and google said 'it depends' which means yes
my aunt shared a minion meme about vaccines and now thanksgiving is cancelled
the couch has my exact body impression and honestly thats my legacy
i dress up just to go to target and cry in the candle aisle
accidentally napped through an earthquake. my power is terrifying
banana on pizza people are braver than the troops
gen z invented therapy speak and uses it in arguments like a weapon
the only thing keeping me here is spite and cheese
my smart fridge judged my 2am cheese run and honestly fair
bone apple tea to everyone having a rough day
job interviews are just lying competitions with dress codes
siri has heard me cry more than any therapist
accidentally set my alarm for 6pm instead of 6am and honestly the universe agreed
